home.title: Maximize Your Harvest Profit
home.subtitle: Data-driven crop recommendations, multi-year profit projections, and real-time market insights tailored for Indian farmers.
home.feat_1_desc: Calculate profit with pinpoint accuracy based on your land size, soil type, and live market prices.
home.feat_2_desc: Get AI-driven crop suggestions prioritizing ROI, suitability, and pest resistance.
home.feat_3_desc: Understand vulnerabilities with our 5-factor risk model (Weather, Price, Pest, Water, Infrastructure).
